Localization.Description: An attempt to change the system.session_log or system.query_log system table is detected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} made an attempt to change the system.session_log or system.query_log system table on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} changed the system.session_log or system.query_log system table on host {event_src.host}
